prestazioni: Engine: 4G63T (7-bolt block, 85mm bore, 88mm stroke) with forged internals including JUN Type 3 pistons (87mm, 8.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 1.0mm overbore capacity. Turbocharger upgrade to a Garrett GT2860-5 (0.64 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller targeting 1.4 bar (20 psi) peak pressure.

Fuel System: Walbro 255 LPH in-tank fuel pump paired with Nismo 550cc/min high-impedance injectors, fed by a Sard 1000cc top-feed fuel rail and AEM X-Series wideband AFR sensor (30-0300) for closed-loop tuning via a Haltech Elite 1500 ECU with custom 4G63T base maps.

Drivetrain & Handling: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) in the rear differential, paired with a Cusco Type-RS front LSD. Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (8-position rebound, 20-way compression damping) and Eibach Pro-Street S anti-roll bars (24mm front, 22mm rear). Braking upgraded to Endless CC-R6 front rotors (296mm) with 4-piston calipers and Ferodo DS2500 pads, plus stainless steel braided lines.
estetica: Body Kit: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody conversion (fiberglass, bolt-on) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (Pandem Evo I-specific). Rear wing replaced with a Top Secret GT-Spec carbon fiber wing (1,200mm span, 3D adjustable angle).

Wheels & Stance: Work Meister S1 3P 17x9 +22 front and 17x10 +30 rear (5x114.3 PCD) with Toyo R888R tires (235/40/17 front, 265/35/17 rear). Fender flares rolled and pulled for clearance, with custom polyurethane fender liners.

Interior & Details: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) with Schroth 6-point harnesses. Custom roll cage by AutoPower (8-point, mild steel, bolt-in) with gusseted main hoop. Engine bay detailed with carbon fiber valve cover (Rally Art replica), titanium oil cap (HKS), and custom aluminum radiator support (1.5mm thick).
